title: GPT 5.6 Sol Just Blew Up The AI World
summary: OpenAI launched GPT 5.6 Sol with limited access following U.S. government pressure, emphasizing new coding and cyber capabilities. The company also introduced Jalapeño, a custom inference chip developed with Broadcom, signaling efforts to reduce Nvidia dependence and control the full AI stack.
writeup: The video covers OpenAI's launch of GPT 5.6 Sol, released as a limited preview to trusted partners following U.S. government pressure, with enhanced coding and cybersecurity capabilities. It also reports on Jalapeño, OpenAI's first custom AI inference chip built with Broadcom, framing it as a move to control its hardware stack and reduce Nvidia dependence. The argument is that these developments mark emerging government oversight of frontier AI and strategic vertical integration across the AI infrastructure market.
